svg.text: Accurate dimensions at 4:1 scale | Based on Waveshare 2.13" HAT (65x30.2mm) + Pi Zero WH (65x30mm)

g.text: Case outer: 88 x 34 x 19 | Display window: 57 x 27 | Active pixels: 48.55 x 23.71 (250x122) | Button cluster: 18 x 20
Waveshare 2.13" e-Paper V4 | 250x122px | B&W | SPI | SSD1680
Raspberry Pi Zero WH (BCM2835 1GHz / Zero 2: BCM2710 1GHz quad)
3D printed PLA/PETG | 2-piece shell | 4x M2 screws | snap-fit option
Display-to-button ratio: 4.3 : 1 (display occupies 4.3x the face area of buttons)
Slightly wider than a credit card, about 2/3 the height
